assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: The response clearly categorizes all four notification types with specific subject patterns: security patches/CVEs, auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, and end-of-life warnings

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: The response uses a 4-tier priority system (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW) with security patches as CRITICAL (highest) and new version available as MEDIUM, with informational as LOW (lowest)

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: The response explicitly states EOL warnings require scheduling upgrades before EOL date and mentions they 'Cannot postpone - will be force-upgraded' for final warnings

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: The response includes specific actions for auto-upgrade notifications: review scheduled date/time, reschedule if conflicts, notify stakeholders, prepare rollback plan, and monitor during upgrade window

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: The response explicitly states for security patches to 'Plan emergency maintenance window' and 'Upgrade within 7 days', indicating expedited action outside normal cycles

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: The response categorizes 'New Version Available' as MEDIUM priority with actions focused on planning: 'Plan upgrade during next maintenance cycle' and 'Test in development environment'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: The response provides email filtering, Slack integration, and basic monitoring setup, but does not specifically mention Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions 'Review release notes' as an action item for new version available notifications
